case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. HENRY ARMANDO REYES RODRIGUEZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $50.00 SERVED JAN-06-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, HENRY ARMANDO REYES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-21-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY NARALLANI SANCHEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, HENRY ARMANDO REYES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-21-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, HENRY ARMANDO REYES $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, HENRY ARMANDO REYES
ORDER RE: COTINUANCE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. MATTER CONTINEUD TO MAY 25, 2020 AT 1:30
